title: DragonMine Z: «Aurora»
description: DragonBall Mod that let's you create your own Character, explore other worlds and fight strong enemies!
body:
[![Bisect Hosting | DragonMine Z](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1136088/description_3f10813a-7919-4d67-9eb2-55b9969fb679.png)](https://discord.gg/b5MgRNb3D7)

![DMZ TitleImage](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1136088/description_202f8087-4b57-49c4-b380-4b14612020c9.png)

**DragonMine Z** is an immersive WIP (Work-In-Progress) Minecraft mod inspired by Akira Toriyama's most-famous work, Dragon Ball. Also check out the mod in [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragonminez)!

Our plan is to take the complete **Dragon Ball** experience into Minecraft, adding everything we can and revamping the vanilla experience. 

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1216429657273012415?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=orange)](https://discord.gg/b5MgRNb3D7)  [![Patreon](https://img.shields.io/badge/Patreon-Subscribe-yellow?style=for-the-badge&logo=Patreon)](https://patreon.com/DragonMineZ) [![GitHub Progress Project](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Progress_Board-red?style=for-the-badge&logo=GitHub)](https://github.com/orgs/DragonMineZ/projects/4)

--[ Requires [GeckoLib 4.8.2+](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) and [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) ]--

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1260409720733175838/1479122033068605641/roadmap.png?ex=69aae33d&is=69a991bd&hm=f11b1153c0dd4d5dd14261e3744008d59dda864aaca3a606f3d5f9b808fc45af&animated=true)

* * *

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1136088/description_2feea4c4-cc3d-4c3e-8245-264e6c8e0fdf.png)

In DMZ, you can create your own character between five Races: Human, Saiyan, Namekian, Frost Demon, Bio-Android and Majin. You also can customize the hair, eyes, skin, aura, colours, and more!

Once you create your character, you'll have access to the **Stats** system, with six values: Strength, Strike Power, Resistance, Vitality, Ki Power and Energy. You can level up your Stats and Skills to be more powerful than your opponents.

### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1136088/description_774a70be-37cc-44d1-8d11-d438bd37bf24.png)

Currently, the mod adds a few structures: The Kami's Lookout, Korin's Tower, Elder Guru's House, Goku's House, Roshi's House and Red Ribbon Towers.

We also added some new dimensions: The Hyperbolic Time Chamber, and Namek. In the future we will add more planets like Sacred Kai Planet, Beerus Planet and Cereal Planet!

(Do we have to mention that you can also craft a Dragon Radar, search the Dragon Balls and summon Shenron to make a wish? No, right?)

### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1136088/description_1b3db616-6a9d-478a-88bd-55253057ba86.png)

Obviously there are plenty items, armors and weapons that you can craft. All of them are planned to have a Vanilla-Like experience.

In Namek, there are Namekian Villages, with Warriors and Traders, similar to Villagers and Golems. If you attack or kill a Trader, you'll become Evil.

We worked hard on allowing the player to tweak almost any setting, whereas you can modify: The Stats limit, Stats Cost, Stats values/increments, Races/Forms Multipliers, and more. Perfect for a server!

The mod has been tested in both singleplayer and multiplayer environments, as of the latest version, (unless otherwise stated) DragonMine Z is compatible with forge dedicated servers.

**Supported Languages:** Too much to list, take a look at our [DragonMineZ dashboard in Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/dragonminez)!  
You can also add yours!

### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1136088/description_8db54c73-713b-4076-a1ff-76b0ca188a32.png)

You can join our [Discord](discord.gg/b5MgRNb3D7) to give us suggestions, reviews, or report issues. Just open a ticket!

Also, you can support the mod development via [PayPal](https://paypal.me/shokkoh). (or [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/DragonMineZ) and get some rewards)

**NOTE:** DragonMine Z is and will always be a free mod. It will never be a paid mod or have pay-to-win features.

### ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1136088/description_4b6ebd8b-6ad1-46f4-a590-13388d8070e0.png)

\- [Yuseix300](https://github.com/yuseix300) | **Founder & Programmer**

### **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1136088/description_b86c0a00-c946-4472-9b5c-6aba7f7666ac.png)**

### 2024-2026, DragonMine Z.  
You can use the Mod to create Addons or modifications requiring the mod, but you can't modify our mod and claim it as yours.
